description.en: The mode of theShadowRoot, eitheropenorclosed. This defines whether or not the shadow root's internal features are accessible from JavaScript.

excerpt.es: The mode of theShadowRoot, eitheropenorclosed. This defines whether or not the shadow root's internal features are accessible from JavaScript.
